temporal_description: (00:00-00:07) A dark sedan with its bright headlights on drives down a narrow, wet street at night. The street is flanked by traditional-style buildings and a golden temple stupa is visible in the background. People are seen walking on the sidewalk as the car approaches. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and mysterious atmosphere, introducing a key vehicle and setting the scene in a specific urban environment.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous musical score begins to build, creating a sense of suspense.)
